content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Powerful array". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/86/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the size of the array. The next line contains n integers, the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: Print 'YES' if the array is powerful, 'NO' otherwise.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check if the array is powerful by verifying if the sum of the absolute values of the differences between adjacent elements is equal to the sum of the absolute values of the differences between the first and last elements and the other elements.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
sum1 = sum(abs(a[i] - a[i - 1]) for i in range(1, n))
sum2 = sum(abs(a[i] - a[0]) + abs(a[i] - a[-1]) for i in range(1, n - 1))
print('YES' if sum1 == sum2 else 'NO')
